In this subtitle, “metropolitan area” means an area that:

(1) contains at least one municipality with a population of at least 100,000; and

(2) includes the adjacent municipalities and unincorporated urban districts.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 541. Definitions
##### § 541.101 — Metropolitan Area

In this subtitle, “metropolitan area” means an area that:

    (1) contains at least one municipality with a population of at least 100,000; and

    (2) includes the adjacent municipalities and unincorporated urban districts.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: In this subtitle, “metropolitan area” means an area that:
contains at least one municipality with a population of at least 100,000; and
includes the adjacent municipalities and unincorporated urban districts.
